title: 清明香入村

production_groups.name: 序幕年景压迫蒙太奇
key_risks: 不要给临时人物正脸或姓名
北境战争只用局部和声音

production_groups.name: 村口验血与沈维桑入场
key_risks: 白册文字避免直接生成
沈维桑不能英雄化出场

production_groups.name: 药屋对答与门槛失言
key_risks: 沈照眠失言不可恐怖化

production_groups.name: 后院旧井与暗格暴露
key_risks: 暗格第一次清楚暴露在SC007

production_groups.name: 全村复查与井沿钩子
key_risks: 短矛封锁线需读清方向
不展示井下人或完整玉片
SC008-SH003 已补井沿可读性覆盖帧，生成时优先使用 override

validation_notes: Backfilled because episode 01 generation-plan.json was missing.
Uses the existing 36-shot director-room shot list without changing story or shot order.
Five existing reference-frame PNGs are locked as canonical first-frame art references.
SC008-SH003 has a dedicated shot override for old-well moon-white glint readability.
Readable story text must be supplied by post-production text layers rather than generated image text.
SC002-SH001 now has a dedicated Shen Weisang gate-observation first frame for I2V production.
